hooks.description: Blocks dangerous shell commands (rm -rf ~, bq rm, gcloud delete, fork bombs, curl|sh).
Blocks exfiltration of secrets via Bash (cat .env, base64, curl upload).
Blocks reading/editing sensitive files (.env, SSH keys, GCP service accounts, dbt profiles.yml).

hooks.command: uv run ruff check --fix --output-format concise src/ tests/ 2>&1 | head -30
hooks.description: Automatically fixes formatting and linting issues using Ruff.
Runs the test suite. Fails fast on the first error to keep the AI context clean.

hooks.command: if [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff; else powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Media.SystemSounds]::Asterisk.Play(); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs your attention', 'Claude Code')"; fi
